zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Bigod於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親Sir Ralph Bigod27歲，母親Idonia Hertford22歲。她和Sir John de Gernon至少有3個女兒。她去世於1350年在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 利斯享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Bigod was born about 1310, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Bigod, was 27 and her mother, Idonia Hertford, was 22. She had at least 3 daughters with Sir John de Gernon. She died in 1350, in Great Leighs, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Bigod est née environ 1310, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Bigod, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Idonia Hertford, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Sir John de Gernon. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Great Leighs, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Bigod um 1310 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Bigod 27 und ihre Mutter Idonia Hertford 22. ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bigodが約1310年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Bigodは27歳，母Idonia Hertfordは22歳であった。彼女はSir John de Gernonとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1350年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト レイグhスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Bigod(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Bigod(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonia Hertford(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Gernon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 레이스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Bigod родилась около 1310 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Bigod было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonia Hertford, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Sir John de Gernon. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности грит лигс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
